creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 158021
knot update to 1.6.4

Correct, the last line of my diff says:

Only in /usr/ports.old/dns/knot/files: patch-src_libknot_dnssec_crypto.c

So that's the part I intended to remove. I guess I better should have used `diff -ruN` (in stead of `diff -ru`). So by these.
